ham.subject: Out of Office: Prakash Kumar – Returning 15th July
ham.body:
Hi All,

I will be out of the office from 10 July to 14 July. I will not have access to email during this period. I will reply to all messages on 15 July.

For urgent matters, please contact my colleague Anjali Sharma at anjali.sharma@example.com or call +91-9876543210.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Prakash Kumar
Senior Analyst

spam.subject: URGENT: Zoom Audit Meeting - Confirm Attendance ASAP
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

You have been selected to attend an important Zoom meeting scheduled for 02:00 PM IST today. This meeting is mandatory for all finance team members and will discuss critical audit procedures.

Please join the Zoom call by clicking <URL> and entering the meeting ID: 123-456-7890. Use the password: FIN123.

We have detected that your account has not been verified for the upcoming audit. Failure to attend will result in a penalty of INR 50,000 and possible suspension of access to company resources.

Your immediate confirmation is required. Reply to this email with "CONFIRMED" or "NOT AVAILABLE".

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
Finance Compliance Team

---
This email is part of an automated security protocol. Please do not reply to unknown senders.
